visual_analysis: The application presents a clean and modern design, featuring a well-organized layout that effectively uses color gradients to differentiate elements. The typography is clear and easy to read, although some areas may feel slightly cluttered due to overlapping elements.
educational_analysis: The visual content teaches the concept of a B-Tree index, presenting key values and actions in an interactive format. While the educational purpose is clear, the absence of detailed explanatory elements may hinder deeper understanding for some learners, impacting the overall educational quality.
